settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage language, theme, real-time alerts, and voice assistant options.
settings.notifications_desc: Receive web push alerts for sudden weather changes and warnings.
settings.voice_desc: Read weather alerts and decision metrics out loud using speech synthesis.

alerts.title: Weather Advisories
alerts.noAlerts: No active weather alerts at this moment.
alerts.custom_alerts_desc: Manage which occurrences trigger immediate alerts on your device.
alerts.rain_alerts_desc: Get notified when heavy rain is predicted in your area.
alerts.travel_alerts_desc: Get warnings about road logging or water blocks.
alerts.lightning_alerts_desc: Get quick warnings during critical lightning conditions.
alerts.note_text: MazhaCar alerts are generated based on Meteorological Department and Disaster Management data.

about.title: About MazhaCar
about.description1: MazhaCar is an AI-powered weather decision platform designed for India, focusing on translating complex weather metrics into simple, actionable daily advice.
about.description2: Built for high usability, localization, accessibility, and real-time alerts. Default language is Malayalam.
about.developer: Developed with Apple-level minimalism and glassmorphic designs.
about.why_point1: Translates complex weather datasets into clear, actionable advice.
about.why_point2: Primary focus and design support for regional Indian languages.
about.why_point3: Works seamlessly with minimal network bandwidth.
about.free_service_desc: MazhaCar utilizes Open-Meteo, OpenStreetMap, and Nominatim under open/creative commons licenses.

forecast_data.subtitle: Hourly and daily forecast projections to plan your schedules.

map_data.subtitle: View live weather markers and regional rain probabilities across Kerala.
map_data.filter_desc: Click to focus on major weather monitoring stations.

favorites_data.subtitle: Weather metrics and advisories for saved monitoring locations at a glance.
favorites_data.no_favorites_desc: Start bookmarking weather stations to view them here.

sunny.desc: The weather is safe. Great time to carry out outdoor activities.
sunny.dry_clothes: It is a bright sunny day, clothes will dry quickly.
sunny.carry_umbrella: Only a 5% chance of rain today.
sunny.travel_safe: Clear skies, roads are safe for travel.
sunny.outdoor_activity: Excellent conditions for sports and travel.
sunny.farming: Favorable temperature and humidity for irrigation and crop checks.

rainy.desc: Rain is expected today. Carry an umbrella when heading out.
rainy.dry_clothes: High chance of rain. Dry your clothes indoors.
rainy.carry_umbrella: 80% chance of rain, an umbrella is highly recommended.
rainy.travel_safe: Roads might be slippery. Drive slowly and with caution.
rainy.outdoor_activity: Wet and damp conditions are unsuitable for outdoor activities.
rainy.farming: Sufficient soil moisture, avoid pesticide application.

cloudy.desc: Overcast conditions. Light showers may occur at any time.
cloudy.dry_clothes: Due to cloud cover, clothes will take longer to dry.
cloudy.carry_umbrella: Sudden drizzle is possible under heavy clouds.
cloudy.travel_safe: Cool climate, pleasant conditions for travel.
cloudy.outdoor_activity: Favorable outdoor weather as sun heat is low.
cloudy.farming: Moderate weather, soil moisture levels are highly variable.

stormy.desc: Heavy winds and thunderstorm. Avoid non-essential travels.
stormy.dry_clothes: High winds and storm risk. Keep clothes inside.
stormy.carry_umbrella: Severe winds make umbrellas ineffective. Stay indoors.
stormy.travel_safe: Risk of uprooted trees and water logging. Avoid travel.
stormy.outdoor_activity: Thunderstorm warning. Seek safe shelter indoors.
stormy.farming: High storms or extreme heat will damage young seedlings.
